message:
feat(auth): add authentication module and comprehensive E2E test coverage

New features:
- Add auth module structure for skill authentication workflows
- Add auth command to CLI for managing authentication state
- Extend error types to support auth-related error conditions

Testing improvements:
- Add rich_output_workflow.rs E2E tests (463 new lines)
- Add auto_load_workflow.rs tests for automatic skill loading
- Add list_workflow.rs tests for skill listing functionality
- Add mcp_workflow.rs tests for MCP integration scenarios
- Update main.rs and security_workflow.rs test modules

These changes establish the foundation for authenticated skill operations
and significantly expand E2E test coverage for reliability.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
